response.justification: While Wei possesses over 15 years of solid software engineering and entrepreneurial experience, the resume primarily reflects a Senior/Staff full-stack developer profile rather than a Director-level strategic IC. The candidate lacks the deep, recognized expertise in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning required to drive enterprise AI strategy and advise strategic customers at the Principal level.
strengths: Possesses over 15 years of software engineering experience, satisfying the minimum baseline requirement.
Demonstrates strong entrepreneurial and community-building skills as a founder and frequent workshop organizer.
Has hands-on experience with cloud infrastructure, microservices, and recent exposure to AI-agent developer tooling.
concerns: Lacks the specialized, recognized expertise in AI/ML product development necessary for this specific role.
Current trajectory is at the Staff/Senior full-stack level, which falls short of the expected Director-level strategic scope.
Does not possess the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
